Resume

Resume

AI Architect & Software Engineer | Strategic Consulting | BYU Marriott School of Business

Download PDF LinkedIn

Education

Brigham Young University – Marriott School of Business

Bachelor of Science in Strategic Management and Statistics
Concentration in Finance | Expected April 2028 | Provo, UT

GPA: 3.82/4.00

Scholarship: Brigham Young University Multicultural Scholarship

Experience

Technical Founder

CareBridge Connect
January 2026 – Present | Provo, UT
  • Developed a full-stack healthcare platform improving transparency between skilled nursing facilities and families, delivering key patient well-being indicators in a clear, accessible interface
  • Built an automated CRM of 200+ healthcare facilities across the Western region, generating 50+ warm leads of potential clients
  • Fundraised $1,000+ in grants for initial funding, applied toward software development and go-to-market outreach

Investment Analyst

Nucleus Fund
September 2025 – Present | Salt Lake City, UT
  • Performed due diligence on 15+ early-stage startups by conducting market research, industry expert calls, and financial analysis to evaluate investment potential
  • Contributed to the funding of $500k+ in equity across multiple companies, directly supporting portfolio growth and revenue generation
  • Collaborated with founders to assess how funding would accelerate growth; partnered with a team of analysts to deliver in-depth analyses and pitch decks for investment decisions

Commercial Banking Summer Analyst

Genesis Bank
June 2025 – August 2025 | Newport Beach, CA
  • Supported Genesis Bank’s acquisition of a publicly traded bank by assisting with financial due diligence, improving the Phase 1-2 request list utilizing SMPs such as CapIQ and FactSet
  • Worked alongside the President/COO to plan for the implementation and execution of a large-scale backfile for acquired loans, which beat the one-time cost saved in the acquisition model
  • Collaborated with deal teams on a market expansion strategy, delivering a proposal to senior leadership that identified $30M+ in potential loan and deposit growth across new sectors

Ambassador

Snagtag
January 2025 – June 2025 | Lehi, UT
  • Conducted market research on community impact, providing actionable insights to strengthen Snagtag’s product offerings
  • Represented Snagtag at the Silicon Slopes Startup Expo, generating brand exposure and connecting with 8 investors and 20+ potential clients
  • Gathered feedback on Snagtag’s new app, facilitating discussions with software development engineers to enhance future operations development

Leadership & Professional Development

SEO EDGE Participant

SEO Career
January 2025 – June 2025 | New York, NY
  • Selected for competitive program (< 15% acceptance) providing technical interview preparation and professional development for careers in finance
  • Completed industry-specific training in financial modeling, valuation, and accounting fundamentals

Activities President

BYU FlexGE Student Council
January 2024 – April 2024 | Provo, UT
  • Directed planning and execution of service and social events, increasing student participation
  • Privately consulted 25+ students on academic and professional positioning, helping them secure scholarships and admittance to specialty programs

In-Country Humanitarian Director

The Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints
December 2021 – January 2024 | Santo Domingo, Dominican Republic
  • Engaged with dozens of individuals in Spanish (fluent) across social media, cold calling, door-to-door, and referral channels promoting community engagement and humanitarian work
  • Collaborated with community leaders to coordinate social and educational events, positively impacting underprivileged populations
